# 2025-11-11 — Tuesday

Clear morning. Ran along the avenida.

Priya pushed the tokenizers bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Re-read my own PR from yesterday. Disliked three comments I'd left. Edited them.

Pushed the fix. Ran ollama twice to be sure.

Worked on the the dataset doctor pass. 0.82 is the right knob; 0.86 over-merged, 0.92 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Ran into Tomás at Bairro Alto. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.

Reading the Ursula Le Guin essays again. The one on anger still lands.

Ran into Duarte at Lisbon. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.

Most of my bad code is written while trying to prove I was right earlier.
